data.title: Westport Fuel Systems Discloses Cyberattack and Warns of Delay to 2025 Annual Results
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Westport Fuel Systems ( (TSE:WPRT) ) has shared an announcement.

Westport Fuel Systems reported that on March 17, 2026 it detected unauthorized access to parts of its network, affecting certain internal IT business applications and some business and employee information. The company immediately activated incident response measures, brought in external experts and continues to investigate while exploring additional security protocols.

Westport emphasized that its manufacturing systems run on separate dedicated servers, so production continuity, order fulfillment and operational delivery have not been disrupted and are not expected to be materially affected. However, because the breach occurred during its year-end reporting cycle, the company is conducting extra internal checks on the integrity of its financial results and expects to file its annual financial statements after the March 31, 2026 regulatory deadline.

The incident highlights Westport’s operational resilience, as its core manufacturing operations remain intact despite the cybersecurity event. At the same time, the delayed annual filing signals potential short-term uncertainty for investors and other stakeholders around the timing, though not necessarily the substance, of its upcoming financial disclosures.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:WPRT) stock is a Hold with a C$2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Westport Fuel Systems stock, see the TSE:WPRT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WPRT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WPRT is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, ongoing losses, and deteriorating free cash flow), partially offset by a stronger balance sheet with low leverage. Technicals provide some support from positive momentum, but overbought signals raise near-term risk. Earnings call messaging is mixed, with improved margins and planned cost reductions counterbalanced by a larger net loss and negative EBITDA.

To see Spark’s full report on WPRT stock, click here.

More about Westport Fuel Systems

Westport Fuel Systems Inc. is a Vancouver-based technology and innovation company focused on affordable, low-emissions transportation solutions. It designs, manufactures and supplies advanced components and systems that enable the shift from traditional fuels to cleaner energy, including natural gas, renewable natural gas and hydrogen for OEMs and commercial transport fleets.

With decades of engineering expertise, Westport targets customers seeking to meet performance, regulatory and climate objectives in a cost-effective way. Its technologies are positioned to help partners achieve sustainability goals without compromising performance or cost efficiency, supporting the wider adoption of scalable clean transport solutions worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 13,684

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$46.18M

data.title: Asia Strategy Digit Unveils Funding Plan for New AI-Driven Voice Solutions Business
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

China Jicheng Holdings Limited ( (HK:1027) ) has shared an announcement.

Asia Strategy Digit Technology Holdings Limited has detailed the use of proceeds from a recent share placing, allocating HK$3.7 million to develop a new voice communication solutions business and HK$5 million to general working capital such as salaries. The company, which maintains about HK$5 million in bank and cash balances for daily operations, says the funding addresses an imminent capital need and is expected to be fully utilized by the end of 2026.

The new business will center on voice communication modules embedded in lifestyle products including toys, robots and smart home appliances, aiming to broaden revenue streams by tapping a rapidly evolving market for integrated, user-friendly solutions. The group is leveraging its long-standing retail distribution channels, newly hired AI-focused software engineers and planned partnerships with industry leaders to co-develop advanced AI voice features, while keeping initial capital outlay to HK$3.7 million for prototype development and scaling investment based on first-stage market traction.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1027) stock is a Hold with a HK$3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Jicheng Holdings Limited stock, see the HK:1027 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Jicheng Holdings Limited

Asia Strategy Digit Technology Holdings Limited, formerly known as China Jicheng Holdings Limited, operates in the consumer products space with a focus on lifestyle goods sold through convenience stores, drugstores and chain retailers. Leveraging more than 30 years of experience in sales and marketing channels for consumer goods, the group aims to extend its portfolio from umbrellas into toys, small robots and smart home appliances featuring embedded voice communication technology.

Average Trading Volume: 72,742

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Prestige Consumer to Acquire Breathe Right Brand Portfolio
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Prestige Consumer Healthcare ( (PBH) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 19, 2026, Prestige Brands, Inc., a wholly owned unit of Prestige Consumer Healthcare, signed an asset purchase agreement to acquire from Foundation Consumer Brands a portfolio of over-the-counter health products centered on Breathe Right nasal strips for $1.045 billion in cash. The acquired portfolio generated about $200 million of revenue and $95 million of EBITDA in the 12 months to Dec. 31, 2025, and would make Breathe Right Prestige’s largest brand, adding a leading global “better breathing” franchise with significant international exposure.

Prestige plans to fund the transaction with cash and a new term loan, implying pro forma net leverage of roughly 4.0 times at closing and a planned return to below 3.0 times by fiscal 2028, supported by what the company describes as strong free cash flow. Management is positioning the deal as immediately accretive to revenue, margins, earnings and free cash flow, and as a scale-enhancing move that strengthens Prestige’s competitive position in consumer health, although completion remains subject to antitrust clearance and other customary closing conditions, with closing expected in the first half of fiscal 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (PBH) stock is a Buy with a $77.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prestige Consumer Healthcare stock, see the PBH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PBH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PBH is a Outperform.

PBH scores well on financial performance driven by strong cash flow and healthy margins, supported by constructive (but not fully recovered) technical momentum. The earnings call reinforces cash-flow durability and margin improvement, but the overall score is held back by ongoing revenue softness tied to supply constraints and a mid-range valuation with no dividend yield provided.

To see Spark’s full report on PBH stock, click here.

More about Prestige Consumer Healthcare

Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. is a U.S.-based over-the-counter consumer healthcare company whose portfolio spans branded products in categories such as cold relief, oral analgesics and other everyday health remedies. The group focuses on acquiring and scaling established consumer brands, with a strategy built around high gross margins, strong cash generation and disciplined leverage management.

Average Trading Volume: 387,354

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.84B

data.title: AITX Wins Order for RIO 360 AI Security Towers
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions ( (AITXD) ).

On March 20, 2026, Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions and its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices announced that a channel partner has booked an order for five RIO 360 solar-powered autonomous security towers for deployment at a high-traffic downtown civic center in a major Midwestern city. Each unit will run on RAD’s SARA agentic AI platform, extending the firm’s presence in municipal environments and underscoring growing acceptance of autonomous security as a cost-effective alternative to traditional guarding models.

With this order, the channel partner will surpass 30 deployed RAD devices, including a mix of RIO and ROSA units all powered by SARA, highlighting traction within municipalities, Business Improvement Districts, and other public space operators. The company is using industry trade events such as ISC West 2026 to demonstrate these technologies to security professionals and potential partners, aiming to scale deployments and strengthen its position in the AI-enabled security services market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AITXD) stock is a Hold with a $0.01 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions stock, see the AITXD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on AITXD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AITXD is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by very weak financial fundamentals (large losses, negative equity, and continued cash burn) despite strong recent revenue growth. Corporate events are a relative positive (order momentum and reduced dilution risk), while technical and valuation inputs provide limited support due to missing indicators and a negative P/E.

To see Spark’s full report on AITXD stock, click here.

More about Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions

Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions, Inc. is a Detroit-based provider of AI-driven security and productivity solutions, primarily operating through its subsidiary Robotic Assistance Devices, Inc. The company offers stationary and mobile robotic security devices delivered via a Solutions-as-a-Service model, targeting the nearly $50 billion U.S. security and guarding services market with cost-saving autonomous alternatives.

RAD’s portfolio, including its SARA agentic AI platform, is designed to complement or replace traditional manned guarding in sectors such as enterprises, municipalities, transportation, critical infrastructure, education, healthcare, and government. The company has completed a SOC 2 Type 2 audit to validate its internal controls, and it maintains a sales pipeline that includes more than 35 prospective Fortune 500 clients for recurring, scalable deployments.

Average Trading Volume: 4,006,347

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $24.11M

For a thorough assessment of AITXD stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

The latest announcement is out from Melrose ( (GB:MRO) ).

Melrose Industries has granted chief executive Peter Dilnot an award over 591,205 ordinary shares under its 2024 Performance Share Plan, structured as a nil-cost option. The award will vest on 19 March 2029, subject to performance conditions, underlining the group’s continued use of long-term, performance-linked equity incentives to align top management with shareholders and support its value-focused business model.

The transaction, conducted outside a trading venue on 19 March 2026, has been disclosed in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements for dealings by persons discharging managerial responsibilities. This reinforces Melrose’s compliance and governance practices, while potentially strengthening investor confidence in the transparency of its executive remuneration framework.

data.title: Magnum Ice Cream CEO Buys 40,000 Shares, Boosting Stake and Market Signal
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Magnum Ice Cream Co. N.V. ( (MICC) ).

The Magnum Ice Cream Company N.V. disclosed that Chief Executive Officer Peter ter Kulve acquired 40,000 ordinary shares in the company on 19 March 2026 on the Amsterdam Stock Exchange. The transaction, conducted in line with EU and UK Market Abuse Regulation requirements, signals management’s direct equity exposure and may be read by investors as an indication of confidence in the company’s prospects.

The share purchase by the CEO reinforces alignment between senior leadership and shareholders at a time when Magnum Ice Cream Co. continues to leverage its global scale and portfolio of leading ice cream brands. Such PDMR dealings are closely watched by the market, as they can influence sentiment around governance, strategic direction and the company’s positioning in the competitive global consumer goods sector.

More about Magnum Ice Cream Co. N.V.

The Magnum Ice Cream Company N.V. is the world’s largest ice cream producer, headquartered in Amsterdam and listed in Amsterdam, London and New York. It operates thirty factories, twelve R&D centres and a fleet of three million freezer cabinets, generating €7.9 billion in 2025 revenue across 80 markets with brands including Magnum, Ben & Jerry’s, Cornetto and the Heartbrand.
